title: L7 soul.surface Payload
description: Audit-event payload for an L7 SOUL.md SessionStart surfacing. cycle-098 Sprint 7. Records the surfacing event itself (with size/truncation/sanitization metadata); the SOUL.md content lives in the project root and is operator-managed.

file_path.description: Repo-relative path to the SOUL.md file.

schema_version.description: Echoes the doc's frontmatter schema_version verbatim. Pattern (not enum) so future doc-schema bumps don't self-DoS the audit emit (cycle-098 Sprint 6E CYP-F5 precedent). cycle-098 Sprint 7 cypherpunk MED-2: maxLength bound prevents adversarial caller of soul_emit from passing arbitrarily large version strings.

outcome.description: surfaced = clean load; schema-warning = warn-mode with [SCHEMA-WARNING] marker; schema-refused = strict-mode failure (no surface); file-missing = SOUL.md absent; disabled = soul_identity_doc.enabled=false.

body_byte_size.description: Size of the SOUL.md file body in bytes (frontmatter excluded), pre-truncation.

surface_byte_size.description: Size of the surfaced (post-sanitization, post-truncation) text in bytes.

truncated.description: True iff body_byte_size > surface_max_chars (UTF-8 character count) and the surface was truncated.

sanitization_signals.description: BLOCKER/INFO lines emitted by sanitize_for_session_start (e.g., 'BLOCKER: tool-call pattern detected'). Each preserved verbatim for audit.

missing_required_sections.description: Section headings that were required but absent (e.g., 'What I am'). Empty when fully conformant.

prescriptive_section_hits.description: Sections that triggered the prescriptive-pattern rejection (NFR-Sec3). Heading text only — body text is NOT echoed (it could carry untrusted content; ANSI/CR scrubbed in the heading by the lib).
